title: CSV Data Cleaning Pipeline
description: Clean raw CSV data rows (strip whitespace, parse floats, drop empty entries) using comprehensions.
solution:
def clean_csv_rows(raw_rows):
    return [[float(val.strip()) for val in row.split(',') if val.strip().replace('.','',1).isdigit()] for row in raw_rows if row.strip()]
solutionExpl: Cleans and converts raw CSV string rows using nested list comprehensions.
